proposal.label: Proposal
proposal.title: Tailored proposal review surface
proposal.description: The hero follows the wireframe layout you shared: banner first, proposal panel second, sender and recipient company cards on the right, and the voice agent floating at the bottom-right.
proposal.documentDescription: Swap the URL below with a Cloudinary-hosted document. PDFs render directly here, and Office documents can use the embedded viewer fallback.

recipient.label: Receiving company
recipient.name: Target Company
recipient.summary: Use this card strictly for recipient-specific account context so proposal details, target-company facts, and logo updates stay independent from LYRIQ branding.
highlights: Replace the sample logo URL with the receiving company's real logo.
Use a Cloudinary document URL for the proposal preview panel above.
Keep company facts here so the page stays account-specific without affecting sender content.
